Freeze block horizontal+vertical bbox fix — 3-tuple freeze_block_sizes, compute_dims total_w leaf, place_subtree alloc_left model

remaining_tasks.name: Live Nuke UAT: verify freeze bbox fix for blocks extending left, right, or both
Commit all fixes, update VALIDATION.md and STATE.md
Push to remote (31+ commits ahead of origin)

blockers.description: Freeze block bbox fix (3rd iteration this session) not yet UAT-confirmed — previous two iterations failed
blockers.workaround: none — requires live Nuke with a freeze block whose members extend both left and right of the block root

human_actions_pending.action: Run live Nuke UAT: freeze a block with members left AND right of block root, run Layout Upstream or Layout Selected, verify no overlap with neighbouring subtrees and root is centered above consumer.
human_actions_pending.context: 3rd iteration of bbox fix. alloc_left model: compute_dims leaf returns total_w=right_ext+left_ovh; place_subtree places root at alloc_left+_left_ovh(i) for all 5 layout cases. Also test right-only extension to confirm no regression.

decisions.rationale: Block root is not at the block left edge when members extend left — left_ovh needed for root placement and centering

decisions.decision: compute_dims leaf returns (total_w, height) where total_w = right_ext + left_ovh
decisions.rationale: Parent bands must allocate full horizontal width so ancestor subtrees space correctly around the block

decisions.decision: place_subtree alloc_left model: root placed at alloc_left + _left_ovh(i) for all 5 input layout cases
decisions.rationale: Separates band allocation boundary from root placement position. Non-freeze inputs get _left_ovh=0 — identical to prior behaviour.

next_action: Ask user to run UAT in live Nuke. If bbox fix passes, commit menu.py and node_layout.py, update VALIDATION.md, then ask about push to remote to close v1.3 milestone.
context_notes: Phase 16 all plans were previously completed (prior sessions). This session addressed two UAT bugs: (1) 'util' NameError in menu.py — trivial missing import; (2) Freeze block bbox not respected — neighbours overlapping with frozen blocks. Three iterations of bbox fix. Core insight: compute_dims tracks W as 'rightward from root' with no left-extension concept. Fix: store left_ovh in freeze_block_sizes[2], return total_w from compute_dims leaf, place root at alloc_left+_left_ovh(i) in all 5 place_subtree X-position cases (all_side, n==1, n==2, fan n>=3, non-fan n>=3).
